name: Agent Guardrail Enforcement
description: Routes every OpenClaw tool call through the Agent Guardrail Engine's policy evaluation API before execution.

guardrailUrl.description: Base URL of the Guardrail Engine API

agentSlug.description: Agent slug registered in the Guardrail Engine

failOpenOnNetworkError.description: Allow tool calls when the Guardrail Engine is unreachable (default: false)
